metadata.title: Rapture (Remastered 2001)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:28.10] Toe to toe
[00:31.63] 
[00:35.92] Dancing very close
[00:39.99] Barely breathing
[00:44.65] Almost comatose
[00:50.02] Wall to wall
[00:53.22] People hypnotised
[00:57.83] And they're stepping lightly
[01:02.59] Hang each night in rapture
[01:08.07] 
[01:16.57] Back to back
[01:20.56] Sacrailiac
[01:24.74] Spineless movement
[01:29.01] And a wild attack
[01:34.06] Face to face
[01:37.90] Sadly solitude
[01:42.68] And it's finger popping
[01:48.06] 24 hour shopping in rapture
[01:54.37] 
[02:09.99] Fab Five Freddie told me everybody's fly
[02:12.45] DJ's spinning I said my, my
[02:14.69] Flash is fast, Flash is cool
[02:17.03] Francois sais pas, Flashe no deux
[02:19.35] And you don't stop, sure shot
[02:21.47] Go out to the parking lot
[02:23.51] And you get in your car and you drive real far
[02:26.05] And you drive all night and then you see a light
[02:27.96] And it comes right down and lands on the ground
[02:30.03] And out comes a man from Mars
[02:32.49] And you try to run but he's got a gun
[02:35.05] And he shoots you dead and he eats your head
[02:37.20] And then you're in the man from Mars
[02:39.43] You go out at night, eatin' cars
[02:41.44] You eat Cadillacs, Lincolns too
[02:44.09] Mercuries and Subarus
[02:46.15] And you don't stop, you keep on eatin' cars
[02:49.33] Then, when there's no more cars
[02:51.74] You go out at night and eat up bars where the people meet
[02:54.78] Face to face, dance cheek to cheek
[02:57.25] One to one, man to man
[02:58.76] Dance toe to toe
[03:00.88] Don't move too slow, 'cause the man from Mars
[03:02.32] Is through with cars, he's eatin' bars
[03:05.11] Yeah, wall to wall, door to door, hall to hall
[03:08.41] He's gonna eat 'em all
[03:10.15] Rapture, be pure
[03:11.66] Take a tour, through the sewer
[03:14.23] Don't strain your brain, paint a train
[03:16.13] You'll be singin' in the rain
[03:18.94] I said don't stop, do punk rock
[03:21.63] 
[04:33.02] Well now you see what you wanna be
[04:35.17] Just have your party on TV
[04:37.43] 'Cause the man from Mars won't eat up bars when the TV's on
[04:40.93] And now he's gone back up to space
[04:42.83] Where he won't have a hassle with the human race
[04:45.59] And you hip-hop, and you don't stop
[04:47.55] Just blast off, sure shot
[04:50.10] 'Cause the man from Mars stopped eatin' cars and eatin' bars
[04:52.85] And now he only eats guitars, get up!
[04:53.59]
